name: search_customer
description: Find a customer profile when the user provides identifying information such as email, phone number, full name, or account ID but does not ask to change a subscription or payment.

name: lookup_subscription
description: Inspect plan status, renewal date, trial status, billing cadence, or entitlement details when the user asks what they have or when it renews.

lookup.description: The subscription detail to inspect, such as status, renewal_date, trial_status, or plan.

name: cancel_subscription
description: Stop an active subscription or prevent renewal when the user's main request is to cancel, close, stop, downgrade to no paid plan, or turn off auto-renewal. Use this for straightforward cancellation requests that are not about a refund.

when.description: Whether cancellation should happen immediately or at the end of the current paid period.

name: issue_refund
description: Issue a refund, credit, or reversal for a charge when the user mentions money, billing, payment, charged, invoice, refund, or a mistaken purchase. Use this when the request centers on returning funds.

reason.description: Reason for the refund or credit.

name: escalate_to_human
description: Escalate complex, sensitive, abusive, legal, chargeback, compliance, or exception requests that need a human specialist.

reason.description: Why a human specialist is required.
